hero.subtitle: Travel 10,000 km without leaving southern France. Artisanal, spicy and generous cuisine, prepared with love and tradition.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: From volcanic roots to the heart of Provence.
about.paragraph1: Born in Saint-Denis, our Chef Elisette brought her grandmother's secrets in her suitcases. Ô Phil d'Elo is not just a restaurant, it's a bridge between two cultures.
about.paragraph2After: (local saffron), combava and Bourbon vanilla rhythm our preparations. A cuisine of sharing, warm and unpretentious.

menu.title: A Menu of Flavors
menu.subtitle: A selection of our signature dishes, evolving with the seasons and market arrivals.
